name: music_card
description: Search music and return provider + song_id for sentra-message music segment output. This plugin does not send messages.

keyword.description: Single music search keyword, e.g. song title or title + artist.

song_id.description: Direct song id. If provided, plugin returns immediately without search.

song_name.description: Optional song name for direct mode metadata.

artist.description: Optional artist name for direct mode metadata.

provider.description: Music platform id for outgoing music segment data.type.

limit.description: Max number of candidates returned per keyword (full candidate list for model-side selection).

trigger_patterns: (音乐卡片|歌曲卡片).{0,12}(music\s*card|分享歌曲)
(music\s*card|分享歌曲).{0,12}(音乐卡片|歌曲卡片)
(music\s*card|音乐卡片|歌曲卡片|分享歌曲|点歌|网易云|qq音乐)
